row.Description: Van Epps LLC provides placement and administrative services for Bank Owned Life Insurance (BOLI) to financial institutions. The company specializes in managing separate, hybrid, and general account BOLI, focusing on financial reporting, policy administration, and risk management to optimize BOLI portfolio returns. Operating independently, Van Epps offers client-centric advisory services without conflicts from carrier relationships or broker contracts.
